queries.natural_language: List the titles of all movies directed by 'Christopher Nolan' starring an actor whose name contains 'Christian Bale'.
queries.sql: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE director = 'Christopher Nolan' AND actors LIKE '%Christian Bale%'

queries.natural_language: Find the titles of movies directed by 'Quentin Tarantino'.
queries.sql: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE director = 'Quentin Tarantino'

queries.natural_language: Find movies where both 'Tom Hanks' and 'Robin Wright' are listed as actors.
queries.sql: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE actors LIKE '%Tom Hanks%' AND actors LIKE '%Robin Wright%'

queries.natural_language: List the titles of movies that feature 'Morgan Freeman' but are not directed by 'Frank Darabont'.
queries.sql: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE actors LIKE '%Morgan Freeman%' AND director <> 'Frank Darabont'

queries.natural_language: List all movies directed by either 'Frank Darabont' or 'Quentin Tarantino'.
queries.sql: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE director = 'Frank Darabont' OR director = 'Quentin Tarantino'

queries.natural_language: Find the movie title directed by director which contains 'Robert' and actor which contains 'Tom Hanks'.
queries.sql: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE director LIKE '%Robert%' AND actors LIKE '%Tom Hanks%'

queries.natural_language: List the titles of movies where at least one of the actors is 'Brad Pitt' and the director's name starts with 'D'.
queries.sql: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE actors LIKE '%Brad Pitt%' AND director LIKE 'D%'

queries.natural_language: Find the titles of movies that contain at least 2 commas in their actors list.
queries.sql: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE LENGTH(actors) - LENGTH(REPLACE(actors, ',', '')) >= 2

queries.natural_language: Find movies where the director's name ends with 't' and also has an actor whose name starts with 'J'.
queries.sql: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE director LIKE '%t' AND actors LIKE 'J%'

queries.natural_language: Find the number of movies for each director.
queries.sql: SELECT director, COUNT(*) AS movie_count FROM movie GROUP BY director

queries.natural_language: List the titles of movies with more than one actor listed.
queries.sql: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE actors LIKE '%,%'
result_rows: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
Portrait of a Lady on Fire

queries.natural_language: Show the directors who have directed movies where 'Morgan Freeman' acted.
queries.sql: SELECT DISTINCT director FROM movie WHERE actors LIKE '%Morgan Freeman%'

queries.natural_language: List the titles of movies where actors have names longer than 15 characters.
queries.sql: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE LENGTH(actors) > 15
result_rows: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
Portrait of a Lady on Fire

queries.natural_language: Show movie titles along with their director and actors where director name begins with 'F' and actor name contains 'Morgan'.
queries.sql: SELECT title, director, actors FROM movie WHERE director LIKE 'F%' AND actors LIKE '%Morgan%'

queries.natural_language: Find the directors who have directed more than one movie in our database.
queries.sql: SELECT director FROM movie GROUP BY director HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

queries.natural_language: Find titles of the movies where director's name contains the letter 'a' and actor's name contains the letter 'o'.
queries.sql: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE director LIKE '%a%' AND actors LIKE '%o%'
result_rows: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest

queries.natural_language: Find the average length of the actor list (number of characters) for movies directed by 'Christopher Nolan'.
queries.sql: SELECT AVG(LENGTH(actors)) FROM movie WHERE director = 'Christopher Nolan'

queries.natural_language: List the directors who have directed movies where 'Christian Bale' is an actor and the director's name also contains the letter 'r'.
queries.sql: SELECT DISTINCT director FROM movie WHERE actors LIKE '%Christian Bale%' AND director LIKE '%r%'

queries.natural_language: Find the titles of movies where the number of actors (separated by commas) is greater than 1 and the director is not 'Christopher Nolan'.
queries.sql: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE (LENGTH(actors) - LENGTH(REPLACE(actors, ',', ''))+1) > 1 AND director <> 'Christopher Nolan'
result_rows: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
Portrait of a Lady on Fire
One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest

queries.natural_language: List distinct director names that include the character 'n' and have cast members containing the character 'a'.
queries.sql: SELECT DISTINCT director FROM movie WHERE director LIKE '%n%' AND actors LIKE '%a%'
